Electrical in Garland, TX

Trusted local professionals serving Garland and surrounding communities

Serving Garland, TX

In Garland, TX, Horizon Electrical helps homeowners and businesses with electrical repairs, upgrades, and new installations. Many homes in Garland were built in the mid-20th century and benefit from updated wiring and energy-efficient lighting. Our team ensures your electrical system can handle the demands of modern appliances and technology.

Garland's mid-century homes often need electrical updates for safety and efficiency.

Electrical Services in Garland

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Modernize your home's electrical heart for safety and capacity.

Learn more →

Whole-Home Surge Protection

Defend your electronics from Texas' violent thunderstorms.

Learn more →

Ceiling Fan Installation & Repair

Keep cool efficiently with properly installed airflow solutions.

Learn more →

Landscape & Security Lighting

Illuminate your property with weatherproof Dallas-tested designs.

Learn more →

Standby Generator Installation

Keep power flowing during Texas grid failures and storms.

Learn more →
